title: 目標達成の後に・秘密基地

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since we decided to aim for the Classics,
we've been steadily building strength through
continued training and racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first of the Classics is the Satsuki Sho, where
she can take advantage of her special skills.
choice_data_list:
(I do worry about the jump to such a big race,
however.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if it would be better to work up to it
with smaller races, like—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The Yayoi Sho?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like the Satsuki Sho, the Yayoi Sho also takes
place at Nakayama Racecourse. It's the perfect
race to ease her in.
choice_data_list: Think of it as a warm-up for the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Understood. As long as I get to run fast, any race
will do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to participate in the Yayoi
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm going to run another lap then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Recently, our training has focused mostly on
Silence Suzuka's stamina. One day...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Would you like to go hiking?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I thought that hiking would be good for building
my stamina. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You're more than welcome to come with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm open to the idea, so we take a trip to the
mountains.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Are you doing okay?
choice_data_list: Don't let me slow you down. Go on ahead!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No, we came here together. I'll wait.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This is so refreshing. I'm usually out here running
by myself.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(I wonder if I should be giving encouragement at
times like this...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Y-you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue our hike, Silence Suzuka cheering
me on, until we finally reach the peak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The view from the top is absolutely stunning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The snow atop the distant mountains faintly
glimmers beneath the deep blue sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn to my side to see Silence Suzuka gazing out
at the view.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Only sometimes, as training. Particularly in spring,
when the cherry blossoms are in bloom. And also
fall, when the leaves turn red.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I think it's the most beautiful during this time
of the year.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: When it's cold out... the earth smells so fresh.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And I come flying up that narrow trail knowing this is what's waiting for me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I always feel happy to have made it all the way to
the end.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: If you put it that way... Yes, I can see it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've been wanting to share this view with you for
some time.
choice_data_list: I'm also happy to have made it all the way here.
I'm also happy to have made it all the way here.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She chuckles softly to herself. I get the feeling
that we've grown a little closer.
